brand.name: Owen Leather Goods
brand.announcement: Handmade leather goods — request a custom build anytime.

products.title: Rusty Bifold Wallet
products.description: Handcrafted from full-grain leather. Classic bifold with card slots and a spacious cash pocket.
highlights: Full-grain Crazy Horse leather (Made in the USA)
Features 6 card slots 2 hidden pockets and a cash pocket
products.materials: Rust Brown Crazy Horse Leather from Siedel(USA), Cognac Minerva Leather from Badalassi Carlo (Italy)
products.care: Avoid soaking. Condition occasionally with a neutral leather balm. Keep away from direct heat.

products.title: Cognac Long Wallet
products.description: Handcrafted from full-grain leather. Custom Long Wallet with card slots and a spacious cash pocket.
highlights: Features 7 card slots 2 hidden pockets, a cash slot and an ID window
products.materials: Cognac and Walnut Minerva Leather from Badalassi Carlo (Italy)
products.care: Avoid soaking. Condition occasionally with a neutral leather balm. Keep away from direct heat.

products.title: Natural Veg Tan Belt
products.description: Thick, durable belt built to last. Solid hardware and clean finishing.
products.materials: 8–10 oz full-grain leather, solid buckle hardware.

products.title: Horween Cavalier Belt
products.description: Thick, durable belt built to last. Solid brass hardware. Cut to your size and buckle preference.
products.materials: 8–10 oz full-grain leather Ink Blue Horween Cavalier (Made in USA), solid brass nickel plate buckle, solid brass nickel plate rivets.
products.care: Wipe clean with damp cloth. Condition lightly as needed.

products.title: Crossbody Sling Bag
products.description: A structured travel bag with premium leather and rugged stitching.
highlights: Built for daily life and travel
products.materials: Taurillion green calf leather (Spain), Natural Minerva Leather from Badalassi Carlo (Italy), solid brass hardware.
products.care: Condition occasionally. Store away from heat and moisture.
products.dimensions: Varies by build — confirm in request.
